global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 deal on late-night offers.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Placeholder for app screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center with a light purple background, resembling a placeholder for an app screenshot.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Shop now' in bold, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' in bold, stylized font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small circular tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, positioned at the top left corner near the logo.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 deal, BiteRush logo, SALE badge
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, the app screenshot is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Late-night deals available, €29.99, Shop now, BiteRush, SALE, UGC
embedding_texts.elements_text: app_screenshot: A rectangular area in the center with a light purple background, resembling a placeholder for an app screenshot. | headline: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' with a smaller line below it saying 'Late-night deals available'. text='2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available' | cta: A prominent white button with the text 'Shop now' in bold, located at the bottom of the ad. text='€29.99 Shop now' | logo: The logo 'BiteRush' in bold, stylized font, positioned at the top left corner. text='BiteRush' | discount_badge: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, located at the top right corner. text='SALE' | social_proof: A small circular tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, positioned at the top left corner near the logo. text='UGC'
